title: RizekPack
description: Simple resourcepack replacing cooked porkchop with řízek
body:
Everyone loves Řízek / Schnitzel, and this packs brings one of the best foods into one of the best games!!! 

This resource pack changes the boring **cooked porkchop** into a tasty yummy řízek!!

**WARNING: Delicious.**

Grab a side dish with your řízek here: [PotatoSaladPack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/potatosaladpack)

![Showcase of the pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39f978ba2d0286fe92fd02f2c272ff93eb91f5f0.png)
